steps.title: Prerequisites
steps.body: Bridge running. Optional, automated-covered serialization check: confirm the reflective serializer walks struct fields and emits a JSON object (not the old stringified "(x, y, z)" form). Field reflection is asserted by the automated test below; this scenario is a runnable confidence pass against the live serializer.

steps.title: Expected outcomes
items: mutation.output is a JSON object, e.g. {"$type":"Vector3","x":1,"y":2,"z":3,...}
if include_properties is on, computed properties appear but the payload stays a single object

reset.note: execute_csharp is transient (no disk artifact); nothing is reverted on disk.
